home.heroTagline: Your Expert and Trusted Partner in North Cyprus
home.heroTitle: The Right Investment Opportunities in North Cyprus,
home.heroTitleHighlight: the Rising Star of the Mediterranean
home.heroSubtitle: With 21 years of finance experience and deep local knowledge of North Cyprus, we deliver strategic real estate advisory tailored to you.
home.aboutIntro: Primevest Investment treats real estate not as an emotional choice, but as an analytical and sustainable investment instrument.
home.aboutListIntro: Every investment decision is modelled on:
home.aboutListOutro: Our focus is on well-structured investments that stay strong over the long term.
home.featuredSubtitle: High-standard, value-driven investment opportunities from strong developers in North Cyprus' most sought-after locations.
home.whySubtitle: This paradise island in the eastern Mediterranean offers unique opportunities for real estate investors.

whyItems.title: High Return on Investment
whyItems.description: Real estate investments in North Cyprus pay for themselves in as little as 8-12 years. Steadily rising land and property values deliver strong rental yields.

whyItems.title: Open to Foreign Investors
whyItems.description: Foreign nationals can easily purchase property. Simple, fast title deed procedures provide a secure investment environment.

whyItems.title: Tax Advantages
whyItems.description: Maximise your net return with low tax rates and investor-friendly policies. Earn rental income in foreign currency (GBP).

whyItems.title: Mediterranean Quality of Life
whyItems.description: With 300+ days of sunshine a year, unspoilt nature, a safe living environment and low population density — one of the most liveable spots in the Mediterranean.

whyItems.title: Strategic Location
whyItems.description: At the crossroads of Europe, the Middle East and Africa, just a 45-75 minute flight from Türkiye — a strategic location advantage.

whyItems.title: Growing Infrastructure
whyItems.description: Rapidly developing infrastructure with a new airport, motorways, universities and tourism investments. A market that keeps gaining value.

home.ctaText: Have questions about real estate investment in North Cyprus? Get in touch now for personalised advisory. Your first consultation is free.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The address of the right investment in North Cyprus, with an advisory model built on trust.
about.storyParagraph1: Primevest Investment was founded by Gülay Yıldız, who combines more than 21 years of banking and finance experience with real estate investment advisory. She built a strong institutional foundation at leading banks such as Garanti BBVA, ING Bank and Türk Ekonomi Bankası, reinforced by the operational and strategic experience of managing a branch in North Cyprus for the last 8 years of her career.
about.storyParagraph2: With more than 8 years of on-the-ground experience in North Cyprus, a strong local network and the multifaceted perspective of dual citizenship, Primevest does more than present opportunities — it develops well-structured, sustainable and secure investment models for its investors.
about.storyMotto: Our approach is clear: the right time, the right location, the right project.
about.storyParagraph3: At Primevest, our goal is not simply to match an investor with a property, but to guide them towards strategic decisions that protect and grow their capital. For us, every investment is not a transaction but the beginning of a long-term relationship built on trust.

values.title: Trust
values.description: We build transparent relationships with our clients, founded on trust. Honest, open communication at every step.

values.title: Strategy
values.description: We turn 21 years of finance experience into strategic investment advisory.

values.title: Vision
values.description: We look to the future with an innovative approach that brings technology into the world of investment.

values.title: Personal Attention
values.description: We stand by every investor with a personalised, one-on-one advisory model.

about.teamSubtitle: With experts in finance, technology and real estate, we give you the most accurate guidance.
